Did you come here to do some shopping~?
\SE[0]I'm just looking around the place~. Eheheh, I bought the game I really
wanted, so I thought I'd do something a bit more 'human' before I really dig into it.
\SE[28-nb]Once I get into a game, my mind just laser focuses onto it, you know?
...Ah, not as much as before though, okay? I make sure to
properly~ balance my schoolwork and part time work now.
For sure, the old Shino would immerse herself into games and not leave her
room until she finished them as if it was the most natural thing in the world to do.
...Though back then, it was probably more than just because
Her question suddenly brought my mind back to the present.
...There's no reason for me to ruminate over the past, here of all places at that.
If she's happy now then that's for the best.
When I turned to look at her and replied [It's nothing], she
\SE[11]...Well I'm glad then. Fufuh--, you're always lost in your
\sa[124]\SE[14-nb]...If you don't have any plans, do you want to maybe
look around at the shops here? You don't have to force yourself though--
...I was just thinking about wanting to spend time with her myself.
When I replied in the affirmative, a bright smile popped up on her face.
\SM[pop]\SE[40-nb]\SA[121]Wah, I didn't think you'd actually say yes!
...You're growing up too, aren't you? Fufuh--, let's go then~!
We walked side by side, and looked at all sorts of shops.
Seeing her smiling ear to ear the entire time made me feel a bit energized too.
...Honestly, it might not be a bad idea to bring her out here again sometime,
seeing how much she's loving it. And so time passed between us.

\SA[133]Let's see, what are you doing here?~ Tell your onee-san~?

so if you're not busy, how about we go on a little date?
\SM[nod]\SE[33]Yep, let's go then take a look around the place~. Eheheh~, yay♪
\se[26]\SA[128]Ah, if we're going on a da... I mean, if we're going to look around,
maybe we should go and put my stuff in a coin locker?

\se[12]\SM[rock]Mumumu... that doll's so cute. Are you good at claw
\SE[8]Eh? You'll get it for me? Don't force yourself, okay?
\se[32-nb]\SM[double]Wah~~! You really got it--! Amazing, amazing~♪
...I handed over the cat plushie that I barely managed to get after sacrificing 10 days
worth of lunch money to her. Well, it's just lunch, I can skip that. It'll be fine. Probably.
\se[2]\SA[124]Ah, do you mind if I go use the ladies' room a bit?
Yeah, sorry~. I'll be back soon, just do whatever you like for a bit~
She took her time, and by the time she got back, we realized that we'd spent
quite a nice day together already, so we decided to call it there.
\sa[124]\se[13-nb]Ufufuh--, I had a lot of fun~. Thanks, for going along with that.
...I wasn't really 'going along' with anything, I had fun too.
When I told her that, her smile spread even wider than it already was.
\se[14-nb]Mm, that's what I just... --ove about you.
\sa[124]\se[13-nb]\SM[attack]Here, it's a little gift from me. Accept it, will you?
\SE[13-nb]In her hands was a small, cutely wrapped bag.
When I opened it, I found a cat shaped keychain inside.
It's a little bit too cute for me, personally, but...
\SE[13]I wanted you to carry something that I like everyday~
Eheheh, is it too much? You don't have to, if you don't like it.
I accepted it with a [Thanks], and attached it to a conspicuous spot on my bag.
\SE[8]Eh, are you sure you want to put it there? It's standing out a lot.
No, I just thought you'd mind it. ...Eheheh, I'm so happy.
\se[13-nb]\sa[124]\SM[jump]Hey, wanna come here again after our summer vacation starts?
I want to check out the same stores again, and try some different places too~
[Of course], I said while nodding my head.
...I enjoyed the day a lot too, so if we can do it again then
I really can't ask for more.
As we exchanged a classic pinky promise, I had a thought.
It doesn't matter where we go, really. As long as we're together,
I'd enjoy being just about anywhere.
Hoping that she felt the same way, we went our separate ways.
And I for one sat down on a nearby bench and let the happiness
of the moment seep through me.

-- Suddenly, I had 90% of my vision stolen by something.
While I don't understand what just happened, but the overwhelmingly
soft sensation and sweet scent filled me up... and my consciousness was...
Aah, this must be a dream, I'm sure. And since it's a dream, it's fine even if I let go...
相対値指定フラグ = def
I'm sorry, \n[2], did I squeeze you too tightly!?
It seemed that the thing blocking my vision gave way.
I looked around to grasp the situation as I reeled my consciousness back in,
and found Ayano oba-san standing right in front of me.
\sa[125]\se[17-nb]Thank god~, did that hurt? Are you okay?
It was then that I understood that the entire phenomenon
was caused by Ayano oba-san hugging me suddenly.
...Rather than it hurting, it just felt supremely good.
...Though I didn't have the courage to say that.
\sa[130]\SE[7-nb]I'm really sorry~. I saw you here and I just couldn't
help myself from trying the whole "guess who" thing out...
\SE[26-nb]It was something I always dreamed of doing in my youth~...
You're the only one I could try that sort of thing on, \n[2], so I just couldn't help it~
As Ayano oba-san apologized to me again and again, one big question occured to me.
[Don't you do that whole "Guess who" thing from behind?]
How embarrassing, now my body's starting to feel hot...
While thanking her in my heart for the absolute heaven I just
got to experience, I asked her what she was doing here.
\sa[124]\SE[2-nb]It's actually a rare off day for me, so I came to do some
shopping~. There's so many things I want, I don't know what I'll do~♪
\sa[127]\SE[6-nb]\SM[nod]Oh dearie, going to treat me like a girl of age? I'm so happy~♪
But... I suppose. Only if it's alright with you, \n[2].
\sa[128]\SE[30-nb]The next store I was just about to visit, was actually the lingerie shop, you see?
I wouldn't mind if you were to pick some out for me, \n[2]... how about it?
Ayano oba-san's lingerie... I suppose black, mature lingerie would
suit a woman of charm like her the most. Something that's about half see through.
On the other hand, a pure white set would also be appealing in its own way.
\sa[127]\SE[12-nb]It's of course a bit embarrassing but you'll need the practice
if you're going to pick them out for Shino-chan as well, so I don't mind.
If you were to ask me whether I wanted to see it or not, I definitely wanted to, but...
The me of today definitely didn't have the courage for that.
I bit my cheek with my molars, and declined as respectfully as I could.
\SE[6-nb]Oh my, it'd be embarrassing for you too, wouldn't it?
No, it's entirely fine. Well then, I'll be off. See you, \n[2]♪
...Come to think of it, she was in her underwear that time too, wasn't she?
...I suppressed my urge to think back to that memory, and
imagine her naked, and quickly left the place.
If there's anything you want, I don't mind buying it for you, so just let me know~
\SE[21-nb]Ufufuh--, let's have some fun together during our private time instead~♥

free right now~. Fufuh--, how about we go on a date together?
